title: Amphenol Announces Third Quarter 2023 Dividend
text: WALLINGFORD, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Amphenol Corporation (NYSE: APH) announced today that its Board of Directors approved the third quarter 2023 dividend on its Common Stock in the amount of $0.21 per share at its meeting held on August 3, 2023. The Company will pay this third quarter 2023 dividend on October 11, 2023 to shareholders of record as of September 19, 2023.
